headline: What If Amgen Stock's Patent Worries Are Hiding Its Real Growth Engine?
summary: The market is focused on Amgen's legacy drugs, but one number shows a new, faster-growing core business is already taking over.

headline: Kardigan shares soar after Nasdaq debut
summary: Investing.com -- Kardigan Inc. shares rose iver 27% roughly one hour into its Nasdaq debut on Thursday, after the heart-health focused biotech raised $400 million in an initial public offering.
